free_text: Production of fragments of mass number 6<=A<=11 in 12C,
14N and 16O spallation by alpha-particles at energies
Alpha-particle beam. Cross sections represent an
average over the energy interval of 25-60 MeV and
centered at mean incident energy E=33.4 MeV. The mean
energy of incident alpha particles is found to be
three energy regions of about 10 MeV width.
Incident angle was 45 degrees and approximate flux
Typical error of the residual range was between 5% and
10%. Errors of momentum was between 4% and 8%.
The precision of polar and azimuthal angles was between
These errors increased considerably for very short
tracks of less than 5 microns residual range.
